text: {"acknowledges_specifics":false,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"It references the 1099 and non-receipt but doesn’t address the user’s request about where to find it in-app; it makes no time-bound promises, gives next steps to check email and reply for ops review, introduces no new policies, but deviates from gold by not pointing to the in-app Documents section and instead directing to email, and it remains concise."}
